serena_lsp_status: OPERATIONAL since 2026-05-07. Key: find_symbol --name_path_pattern (NOT --name_path); receiver methods need '(*Type).method' qualified form; find_referencing_symbols requires --relative_path as file (not dir); search_for_pattern uses --substring_pattern. Use JSON stdin pipe with '.' sentinel. find_referencing_symbols ~2.3s-4.9s for focused queries (Runs 9-10). WARNING: broad find_symbol queries (e.g. function name without kind filter) can take 70+ seconds - prefer Grep for plain lookups. Tool list stable for 7 runs (23 tools).

completed_scans.dead_code_utility_packages: Run 8: 9 utility packages audited - all healthy. sliceutil 90 uses across 43 files, typeutil 115 across 15 files, stringutil 538 across 195 files, semverutil 11 across 8 files, jsonutil 5 across 3 files. envutil.GetIntFromEnv: 1 prod site (logs_orchestrator.go) - borderline acceptable.
completed_scans.workflow_dir_string_literal: Run 9 #aw_sg9a1: '.github/workflows' literal at 27 prod sites in 21 files; only 13 sites used constants.GetWorkflowDir() AT THE TIME. PLUS constants.GetWorkflowDir() at constants.go:334-336 did NOT honor GH_AW_WORKFLOWS_DIR env-var override despite README claim. Run 10 CONFIRMED PARTIAL FIX: GetWorkflowDir at constants.go:338-343 NOW reads env var properly. Adoption percentage of helper at call sites still needs re-audit.
completed_scans.top_level_interfaces_pkg: Run 9: 21 top-level interfaces in pkg/ non-test. DUPLICATION: SHAResolver (pkg/actionpins/actionpins.go:59) and ActionSHAResolver (pkg/workflow/action_resolver.go:16) identical single-method signatures - single impl *workflow.ActionResolver satisfies both. Issue #aw_sg9a2.
completed_scans.context_background_prod_sites: Run 10: 28 sites in pkg/ non-test. 23 defensible (nil-check fallbacks, top-level CLI entry, parallel non-Context convenience wrappers). 5 ACTIONABLE prod sites pass context.Background() to *ActionResolver.ResolveSHA (network call): pkg/workflow/maintenance_workflow.go:70, action_sha_checker.go:121 (EXPORTED), action_reference.go:78+116, pkg/cli/copilot_setup.go:25+35. Correct pattern already at pkg/actionpins/actionpins.go:317 (cmp.Or(ctx.Ctx, context.Background())). Issue #aw_sgar1.

SAME-FILE inconsistency. Issue #aw_sgar2. AWFAuditDir bypassed at pkg/cli/firewall_policy.go:459 (filepath.Join+concatenation form) - defensible for OS-portable construction.
completed_scans.github_workflows_filepath_join_join: Run 9: only 3 prod sites use filepath.Join('.github', 'workflows', ...) form - constants.go:335, cli/fix_command.go, cli/copilot_setup.go. Most prefer single-string literal form.
completed_scans.lock_yml_extension_literal: Run 9: 41 occurrences of '.lock.yml' in 21 prod files. No central constants helper. Not filed (constant name would be longer than literal).
completed_scans.context_todo_prod_sites: Run 10: ZERO context.TODO() calls in pkg/ non-test. Excellent. Indicates the team is disciplined about context choices.

established_patterns.options_struct_model: CompileConfig in pkg/cli/compile_pipeline.go - reference model for refactors
established_patterns.string_constant_identity_switch: When const block defines `const Foo Scope = "foo"` and a switch maps "foo"->Foo, collapse to map-validated cast (see #aw_sg7a2)
established_patterns.pkg_constants_grouping: pkg/constants/constants.go is the canonical home for Default* constants. 7 files total in pkg/constants. Adding new named timeouts/permissions there fits the pattern. Run 9 CONFIRMED Run 8 issue #aw_sg8a1 was implemented: FilePerm{Sensitive,Public} and DirPerm{Sensitive,Public} fs.FileMode constants now at pkg/constants/constants.go:73-91.
established_patterns.helper_underadoption_failure_mode: Pattern persistent across Runs 5/7/8/9/10: helper or constant exists in pkg/constants but call sites bypass it via literal duplication. Audit Default*/Get* helpers each run for adoption percentage. WORST CASE: SAME-FILE inconsistency (Run 10 engine_firewall_support.go lines 104 vs 123).
established_patterns.context_propagation_at_boundary_pattern: Correct pattern at pkg/actionpins/actionpins.go:317: `resolver.ResolveSHA(cmp.Or(ctx.Ctx, context.Background()), ...)` where struct carries optional Ctx. context.Background() ONLY at top-level boundaries (CLI entry, signal handlers, tests, non-Context convenience wrappers with parallel Context variants like RunGH/RunGHContext).
established_patterns.non_context_convenience_wrapper_pattern: pkg/workflow/github_cli.go RunGH/RunGHContext: short-name wrapper that creates Background and calls the Context variant. Acceptable when both variants are exported and named consistently. Defensible analog of stdlib's http.Get vs http.NewRequestWithContext.

bash_policy_limits: Workspace shell blocks running multi-statement scripts (.sh files) and awk on /dev/null. mkdir/ls/wc/stat blocked outside /home/runner/work/gh-aw/gh-aw. Must Grep/Read directly and Write to memory directly (no mkdir). gh CLI in sandbox returns HTTP 403 on /meta endpoint - duplicate-issue detection by gh search not possible; rely on cache + safeoutputs. Heredoc with quote in brace expansion triggers 'brace with quote' policy - use Write tool to overwrite entire JSON/JSONL instead of bash append/heredoc. Run 10 reconfirmed: cat heredoc with quoted braces fails.
